text:
22) What is application supported by blocked amount (ASBA)? 
 
ASBA is a facility provided by banks to investors in new fund offers (NFOs) of mutual funds. If 
investors apply for an NFO via ASBA, their application amount gets blocked in their bank account. 
While the amount stays in the account, it cannot be used until the MF unit allotment is done. In 
case of unsuccessful subscription i.e. getting subscription of less than 90% of the minimum
